title: agent_started.tools = (Config.tools ∪ runner builtins) filtered by allowed_tools
description:
SPEC.md §13.1.2: agent_started.tools MUST list the EFFECTIVE tool surface — the union of Config.tools entries and the runner's built-in tool catalog, filtered by Config.allowed_tools when set. Pre-fix the field listed only Config.tools entries, ignoring built-ins and the allowlist, which gave consumers reading the trajectory the wrong answer.

This case declares one Config.tools RPC entry (lookup_user) and two runner built-ins (bash, read_file). The allowlist permits both lookup_user and bash, but NOT read_file. agent_started.tools should therefore contain exactly two entries: lookup_user and bash. read_file is the built-in that gets filtered out, lookup_user passes through, bash is the built-in that gets included via union — exercising all three rules at once.
